# Hong Kong Supplementary Character Set Data

This directory keeps the official DATA.GOV.HK JSON resource for Hong Kong
Supplementary Character Set related information.

Source:

- Dataset: https://data.gov.hk/en-data/dataset/hk-dpo-dpo_hp-hong-kong-supplementary-character-set-related-information
- Resource: https://www.digitalpolicy.gov.hk/open_data/ccli/HKSCS2016.json

Included file:

- `HKSCS2016.json`

The data includes HKSCS code points, characters, HKSCS version, Cangjie input
codes, Cantonese pronunciation, and source references. PurrType uses it as
a low-priority overlay for Hong Kong-specific Cangjie and Sucheng coverage.
